caption: The video captures a scene in what appears to be a rural or semi-urban area, with a group of people gathered outside a building. A woman in a green dress is prominently featured in the foreground, holding a piece of paper and speaking. The text overlay reads "four days had already passed," suggesting a narrative context. In the background, several individuals are seen walking and standing around, some engaged in conversation. The setting includes a dirt ground, a few vehicles parked nearby, and a flag flying on a pole, indicating a possible community or organizational event. The overall atmosphere seems calm and organized, with people going about their activities in an open space.
